channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uprooted road sign for 'The Close', 9th June
item.description:
The road sign for 'The Close' has been damaged and uprooted. It is unsafe and unstable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in Colworth Grove, 9th June
item.description:
More bags of rubbish on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colworth Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 9th June
item.description:
Overgrown tree causing causing pedestrians to either duck down to walk on pavement or walk in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Sandway Road, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household goods & wooden planks dumped on footpath, 9th June
item.description:
Items dumped on footpath, of Charlton Park Lane, including a TV (this has been there for about three weeks), a lamp, box and planks of wood. This is a hazard to pedestrians and unsightly too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping behind coop, 9th June
item.description:
Rubbish been building up for months, all sorts of wood packing rubbish being thrown here and I have small children that have to walk past it every day and it’s getting more dangerous by the day! Something needs to be done about this ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weyman Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, camping tent, rubbish, 9th June
item.description:
A collection of items, including a camping tent, computer chair and clothing, has been left behind Camberwell Library for several weeks. The area has become unsightly and appears to be accumulating litter. Please could these items be removed and the surrounding grassy area and planting beds be cleared of any rubbish. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): D'Eynsford Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dpd materials flytipping, 9th June
item.description:
Dpd have flytipped materials left over from a delivery
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked chute 58-69 Tayside Court, 9th June
item.description:
Chute blocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Audi parked in cycle bay, 9th June
item.description:
Not enough space for cycles because a car is illegally parked there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge left outside for 3 weeks, 9th June
item.description:
This fridge has been flytippped outside 131 Venner Road for the past 3 weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks with no work happening, 9th June
item.description:
This hole has been there over a week and no one has been working on it. It is not signed with the contractor or reason for the works. The lights are also sometimes not syncing properly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 9th June
item.description:
Many cars blocking fire access, driveway and access to 4 garages.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass and rubbish on road side, 9th June
item.description:
Broken glass shards on the pedestrian walkway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bloomfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate cleaning, 9th June
item.description:
Lancaster estate never gets cleaned/swept/ weeded/ it’s disgusting when is someone actually gonna sweep/clean estate?? Weeds are as big as the trees , weeds coming through pavements rubbish that’s been here months so I know it’s not been cleaned at least 2-3 months, what are we actually paying for ??? We as residents are making a note and preparing to take action if nothing is done soon !!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Belmont road, 9th June
item.description:
There was a fire in a van and a car which now has plastic yellow fence that keeps falling making the road a one lane so it’s hard to turn in about of Byron drive and leads to congestion
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallet and tree stake, 9th June
item.description:
Outside 18 Warren Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warren Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped purple bag, 9th June
item.description:
On pavement next to road name sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warren Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs a lift, 9th June
item.description:
Significantly blocking pavement - needs big haircut

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnaby Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Additional waste added to growing pile, 9th June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foxley Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Sinking pavement potentially causing a trip hazard., 9th June
